text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I lost again. It's embarrassing. But
still...

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
I'm definitely gonna produce results! I'm gonna
overcome this and win!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So please believe in me... and let's get back out
there together!
choice_data_list: That's what I was gonna say.
The fire in our hearts will never go out!
The fire in our hearts will never go out!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
So please believe in me... and let's get back out
there together!
choice_data_list: That's what I was gonna say.
The fire in our hearts will never go out!
The fire in our hearts will never go out!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Sounds we're like on the same wavelength. I'm
glad.

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
It might take some time, but I'm gonna try even
harder. So please... hit me with the toughest
training you've got!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
If I want what it takes to face down my rivals, we
need to get back to training!

text_block_list.name: Bamboo Memory
text_block_list.text:
Until the next race, we won't have a second to
spare!
